---
title: "patient_extraction"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---
# Data import
```{r}
patient_1 <- readRDS("raw_data/patient_1.rds")
patient_2 <- readRDS("raw_data/patient_2.rds")
patient_3 <- readRDS("raw_data/patient_3.rds")
```

# Age and Sex
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)

patient_1 <- patient_1 %>%
  arrange(PatientNumber, AdmTime) %>%
  group_by(PatientNumber) %>% 
  mutate(icu_stay_id = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup()
```

# Scores

```{r}
patient_2
```

# Height and Weight

```{r}
weight_height <- patient_3 %>% 
  filter(VariableName %in% c("Poids du patient", "height")) %>% 
  arrange(PatientID, ValueTime) %>% 
  group_by(PatientID, VariableName) %>% 
  slice(1) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = VariableName, values_from = NumValue) %>%
  rename(weight = `Poids du patient`) %>% 
  group_by(PatientID) %>% 
  fill(weight, .direction = "downup") %>% 
  fill(height, .direction = "downup") %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(PatientID, weight, height) %>%
  distinct()
```

# ICU admission source

```{r}
icu_admission_source <- patient_3 %>%
  filter(VariableName %in% c("service d origine")) %>% 
  mutate(icu_adm_srce = case_when(StringValue %in% c("GHPS Urgences", 
                                                     "Urg autre h\xf4pital"
  ) ~ "Emergency Department",
  
  StringValue %in% c("GHPS Chir Card.R\xe9a", 
                     "GHPS Pneumo",
                     "GHPS M\xe9decine Piette", 
                     "GHPS Infect Bricaire",
                     "GHPS Cardio Salle",
                     "GHPS Chir Card.Salle",
                     "GHPS Neuro",
                     "GHPS Porte",
                     "GHPS Chir autre",
                     "GHPS H\xe9matologie",
                     "GHPS Gyn\xe9co",
                     "GHPS N\xe9phro",
                     "GHPS M\xe9decine autre",
                     "GHPS M\xe9d Int Herson",
                     "GHPS Oncologie",
                     "GHPS Psy",
                     "GHPS Gastro",
                     "GHPS R\xe9a Rouby",
                     "GHPS Uro",
                     "GHPS Ortho"
  ) ~ "Ward", 
  
  StringValue %in% c("M\xe9d autre h\xf4pital",
                     "Chir autre h\xf4pital",
                     "Urg autre h\xf4pital"
  ) ~ "Other Hospital - Non ICU", 
  
  StringValue %in% c("Voie Publique",
                     "Domicile"
  ) ~ "Home or community",
  
  StringValue %in% c("GHPS Cardio USIC",
                     "GHPS R\xe9a Autre",
                     "GHPS R\xe9a Chastre",
                     "GHPS USC Chastre"
  ) ~ "ICU same hospital",
  
  StringValue %in% c("R\xe9a autre h\xf4pital"
  ) ~ "ICU other hospital",
  
  StringValue %in% c("GHPS R\xe9veil"
  ) ~ "Operating theatre",
  
  StringValue %in% c("Autre", 
                     "."
  ) ~ "Other", 
  .default = NA
  )
  ) %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>% 
  slice(1) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  select(PatientID, icu_adm_srce)
```

# Comorbidities

```{r}
chr_patient <- patient_3 %>% 
  filter(VariableName %in% c("New York Heart Association",
                             "Atteinte immuno", 
                             "Atteinte h\xe9patique chronique",
                             "Atteinte r\xe9nale chronique", 
                             "ApachPoumons",
                             "Etat de sant\xe9 ant\xe9rieur",
                             "Cancer m\xe9tastatique",
                             "Pathologie h\xe9matolo maligne",
                             "VIH + r\xe9sultats cliniques",
                             "Score de Mc Cabe",
                             "Tabagisme",
                             "OMS Score",
                             "Accident Vasculaire C\xe9r\xe9bral",
                             "Connectivite",
                             "D\xe9mence",
                             "Diab\xe8te",
                             "Insuffisance Cardiaque",
                             "Infarctus myocarde",
                             "Maladie Pulmonaire chronique",
                             "Ulc\xe8re Gastro-Duod\xe9nal",
                             "Insuffisance R\xe9nale Chronique",
                             "H\xe9pathopathie mod\xe9r\xe9e",
                             "Diab\xe8te Complic visc\xe9rales",
                             "Cancer",
                             "Cancer m\xe9tastas\xe9",
                             "Leuc\xe9mie",
                             "Lymphome, My\xe9lome",
                             "SIDA",
                             "H\xe9mipl\xe9gie",
                             "Grade de Comorbidit\xe9 Charlson",
                             "Hypertension",
                             "nombre verres alcool/j.",
                             "Immunod\xe9pression",
                             "Diab\xe9tique"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableName = case_when(VariableName == "New York Heart Association" ~ "chr_nyha", 
                                  VariableName == "Atteinte immuno" ~ "chr_immunosup_cat", 
                                  VariableName == "Atteinte h\xe9patique chronique" ~ "chr_liver", 
                                  VariableName == "Atteinte r\xe9nale chronique" ~ "chr_renal", 
                                  VariableName == "ApachPoumons" ~ "chr_lung", 
                                  VariableName == "Etat de sant\xe9 ant\xe9rieur" ~ "score_oms", 
                                  VariableName == "Cancer m\xe9tastatique" ~ "chr_meta_cancer", 
                                  VariableName == "Pathologie h\xe9matolo maligne" ~ "chr_mal_haem", 
                                  VariableName == "VIH + r\xe9sultats cliniques" ~ "chr_hiv", 
                                  VariableName == "Score de Mc Cabe" ~ "score_mccabe", 
                                  VariableName == "Tabagisme" ~ "demo_smoking", 
                                  VariableName == "OMS Score" ~ "score_oms", 
                                  VariableName == "Accident Vasculaire C\xe9r\xe9bral" ~ "chr_stroke", 
                                  VariableName == "Connectivite" ~ "chr_connectivite", 
                                  VariableName == "D\xe9mence" ~ "chr_dementia", 
                                  VariableName == "Insuffisance Cardiaque" ~ "chr_heart_failure", 
                                  VariableName == "Maladie Pulmonaire chronique" ~ "chr_pulm", 
                                  VariableName == "Ulc\xe8re Gastro-Duod\xe9nal" ~ "chr_peptic_ulcer", 
                                  VariableName == "Insuffisance R\xe9nale Chronique" ~ "chr_renal", 
                                  VariableName == "H\xe9pathopathie mod\xe9r\xe9e" ~ "chr_liver", 
                                  VariableName == "Diab\xe8te Complic visc\xe9rales" ~ "chr_diabetes", 
                                  VariableName == "Cancer" ~ "chr_cancer", 
                                  VariableName == "Cancer m\xe9tastas\xe9" ~ "chr_meta_cancer", 
                                  VariableName == "Leuc\xe9mie" ~ "chr_leukemia", 
                                  VariableName == "Lymphome, My\xe9lome" ~ "chr_lymphoma_myeloma", 
                                  VariableName == "SIDA" ~ "chr_hiv", 
                                  VariableName == "H\xe9mipl\xe9gie" ~ "chr_hemiplegia", 
                                  VariableName == "Grade de Comorbidit\xe9 Charlson" ~ "score_charlson", 
                                  VariableName == "Hypertension" ~ "chr_hypertension", 
                                  VariableName == "nombre verres alcool/j." ~ "demo_alcohol", 
                                  VariableName == "Immunod\xe9pression"~ "chr_immunosup", ## Full NA
                                  VariableName == "Diab\xe9tique" ~ "chr_diabetes")) %>%
  group_by(PatientID, VariableName, ValueTime) %>% 
  mutate(NumValue_max = max(NumValue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  filter(NumValue == NumValue_max) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-NumValue_max, -NumValue) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = VariableName, values_from = StringValue) %>%
  mutate_all(~str_replace_all(., "\xe","e")) %>%
  mutate_all(~str_replace_all(., "é","e")) %>%
  mutate_all(~str_replace_all(., "�","e")) %>%
  mutate_all(~tolower(.)) %>%
  mutate(chr_hiv = case_when(chr_hiv == "oui" ~ 1,
                             .default = 0
  ), 
  chr_immunosup_cat = case_when(chr_immunosup_cat == "autre pathologie" ~ "Other",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "cancer metastase" ~ "Metastatic cancer",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "corticoides lg cours" ~ "Corticosteroids",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "granulopenie" ~ "Neutropenia",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "greffe moelle alloge" ~ "Allogenic Steam Cell Transplantation",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "greffe moelle auto" ~ "Autogenic Steam Cell Transplantation",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "greffe organe plein" ~ "Solid Transplantation",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "leucemie aigue" ~ "Acute leukemia",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "leucemie chronique" ~ "Chronic leukemia",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "lymphome" ~ "Lymphoma",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "neo hematologique" ~ "Other haematological malignancy",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "normal" ~ "None",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "sida" ~ "HIV/AIDS",
                                chr_immunosup_cat == "tt immunosuppresseur" ~ "Immunospressors", 
                                .default = "None"
  ), 
  chr_liver = case_when(chr_liver %in% c("cirrhose histologie", "encephalopathie", "hie digestive (htp)", "htp documentee", "oui") ~ 1, 
                        .default = 0), 
  chr_lung = case_when(chr_lung %in% c("autre pathologie", "escalier impossible", "htap > 40 mm hg", "hypercapnie chroniq", "polyglobulie ii", "ventile e domicile") ~ 1, 
                       .default = 0), 
  chr_mal_haem = case_when(chr_mal_haem == "oui" ~ 1, 
                           .default = 0),
  chr_meta_cancer = case_when(chr_meta_cancer == "oui" ~ 1, 
                              .default = 0),
  chr_nyha = case_when(chr_nyha == "1, cardiop sans dysp" ~ 1,
                       chr_nyha == "2, dyspnee effort" ~ 2,
                       chr_nyha == "3, dyspmoindreeffor" ~ 3,
                       chr_nyha == "4, dysp repos" ~ 4,
                       chr_nyha == "pas maladie coeur" ~ 0, 
                       .default = NA), 
  chr_renal = case_when(chr_renal %in% c("autre pathologie", "dialyse chronique", "oui") ~ 1, 
                        .default = 0),
  demo_smoking = case_when(demo_smoking %in% c("actif", "sevre") ~ 1, 
                           .default = 0), 
  score_mccabe = case_when(score_mccabe %in% c("0pas de maladie fond", "pas de maladie fond", "pas atteinte vitale") ~ "non-fatal (>5 years)", 
                           score_mccabe == "1<survie<5 ans" ~ "ultimately fatal (1–4 years)", 
                           score_mccabe == "survie<1 an" ~ "rapidly fatal (<1 year)",
                           .default = "non-fatal (>5 years)"), 
  score_oms = case_when(score_oms %in% c("0, activite normale") ~ 0, 
                        score_oms %in% c("1, symptomemod", "a, independant") ~ 1, 
                        score_oms %in% c("2, alite-50% jour", "b, restricti moderee") ~ 2, 
                        score_oms %in% c("3, alite + 50% jour", "c, restricti severe") ~ 3, 
                        score_oms %in% c("4, ne peut se lever", "d, restricti majeure") ~ 4), 
  score_charlson = case_when(score_charlson == "0" ~ "0", 
                             score_charlson == "1 e 2" ~ "1-2", 
                             score_charlson == "3 e 4" ~ "3-4", 
                             score_charlson == "5 ou plus" ~ "≥5",
                             .default = NA
  ), 
  demo_alcohol = case_when(demo_alcohol %in% c("1-3", "4-6", "7 ou +") ~ 1, 
                           demo_alcohol == "0" ~ 0, 
                           .default = NA), 
  PatientID = as.numeric(PatientID)) %>%
  mutate_at(.vars = c("chr_cancer", 
                      "chr_connectivite", 
                      "chr_dementia",
                      "chr_diabetes", 
                      "chr_heart_failure",
                      "chr_hemiplegia",
                      "chr_leukemia", 
                      "chr_lymphoma_myeloma",
                      "chr_peptic_ulcer",
                      "chr_pulm",
                      "chr_stroke"), 
            .funs = ~ifelse(. %in% c("non", NA), 0, 1)) %>%
  group_by(PatientID) %>%
  fill(.direction = "downup") %>%
  mutate_at(.vars = c("chr_hiv", 
                      "chr_liver",
                      "chr_lung",
                      "chr_mal_haem",
                      "chr_meta_cancer",
                      "chr_renal",
                      "demo_smoking",
                      "chr_cancer",
                      "chr_connectivite",
                      "chr_dementia",
                      "chr_diabetes",
                      "chr_heart_failure",
                      "chr_hemiplegia",
                      "chr_leukemia",
                      "chr_lymphoma_myeloma",
                      "chr_peptic_ulcer",
                      "chr_pulm",
                      "chr_stroke",
                      "demo_alcohol"), 
            .funs = ~ifelse(any(. == 1, na.rm = TRUE), 1, 0)) %>%
  mutate(chr_nyha = max(chr_nyha, na.rm = TRUE), 
         score_oms = max(score_oms, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  mutate(chr_immunosup = ifelse(any(chr_immunosup_cat != "None", na.rm = TRUE), 1, 0), 
         score_mccabe = factor(score_mccabe, levels = c("non-fatal (>5 years)", 
                                                        "rapidly fatal (<1 year)", 
                                                        "ultimately fatal (1–4 years)"), 
                               ordered = TRUE), 
         score_charlson = factor(score_charlson, levels = c("0", 
                                                            "1-2",
                                                            "3-4",
                                                            "≥5"), 
                                 ordered= TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(score_mccabe = max(score_mccabe, na.rm = TRUE), 
         score_charlson = max(score_charlson, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(-ValueTime, 
         -chr_immunosup_cat, 
         -'NA') %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate_all(~ifelse(. %in% c(-Inf, Inf), NA, .))
```

# ICU outcome
```{r}
icu_ocm <- patient_3 %>% 
  mutate(VariableName = str_replace(string = VariableName, pattern = "\xe", "e")) %>%
  mutate(StringValue = str_replace(string = StringValue, pattern = "\xe", "e")) %>%
  filter(VariableName == "service destinataire") %>% 
  mutate(ocm_icu_dch = case_when(StringValue %in% c("Morgue") ~ "Death", 
                                 StringValue %in% c("GHPS Porte", 
                                                    "GHPS Ortho", 
                                                    "GHPS R�veil", 
                                                    "GHPS Chir autre ", 
                                                    "GHPS Gyn�co", 
                                                    "GHPS Psy", 
                                                    "GHPS N�phro", 
                                                    "GHPS Gastro", 
                                                    "GHPS Uro", 
                                                    "GHPS Oncologie", 
                                                    "GHPS Infect Bricaire", 
                                                    "GHPS H�matologie", 
                                                    "GHPS Cardio Salle", 
                                                    "GHPS Pneumo", 
                                                    "GHPS Neuro", 
                                                    "GHPS Chir autre",
                                                    "GHPS M�d Int Herson", 
                                                    "GHPS M�decine autre", 
                                                    "GHPS Cardio USIC", 
                                                    "GHPS M�decine Piette",  
                                                    "GHPS Chir Card.Salle"
                                                    ) ~ "Ward",
                                 StringValue %in% c("GHPS Chir Card.R�a",
                                                    "GHPS R�a Chastre",
                                                    "GHPS R�a Rouby",
                                                    "GHPS R�a Autre",
                                                    "GHPS R�a Chastre", 
                                                    "GHPS USC Chastre") ~ "Other ICU same hospital",
                                 StringValue %in% c("R�a autre h�pital") ~ "ICU Other hospital", 
                                 StringValue %in% c("Domicile") ~ "Home", 
                                 StringValue %in% c("Autre") ~ "Other", 
                                 StringValue %in% c("M�d autre h�pital", 
                                                    "Chir autre h�pital") ~ "Other hospital - non ICU", 
                                 
                                 .default = "9999"
                                 )) %>%
  select(PatientID, ocm_icu_dch) %>%
  distinct()


icu_death <- patient_3 %>% 
  mutate(VariableName = str_replace(string = VariableName, pattern = "\xe", "e")) %>%
  mutate(StringValue = str_replace(string = StringValue, pattern = "\xe", "e")) %>%
  filter(VariableName == "ICU outcome in Discharge Info") %>%
  mutate(ocm_icu_death = ifelse(StringValue == "Dcd", 1, 0)) %>%
  select(PatientID, ocm_icu_death) %>%
  distinct()

icu_ocm <- icu_ocm %>% 
  merge(icu_death, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(ocm_icu_death = case_when(ocm_icu_dch == "Death" ~ 1, 
                                   .default = ocm_icu_death))
```


# Data merge
```{r}
patient_final <- patient_1 %>%
  merge(patient_2, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE) %>% 
  merge(chr_patient, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE) %>%
  merge(weight_height, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE) %>%
  merge(icu_admission_source, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE) %>% 
  merge(icu_ocm, 
        by = "PatientID", all = TRUE)

saveRDS(patient_final, "clean_data/patient_final.rds")
```

```{r}
library(gtsummary)

patient_final %>%
  select(PatientSex, 
         AdmissionAgeInCalYears, 
         APACHE, 
         SAPS,
         grep("chr_", colnames(.)), 
         height, 
         weight, 
         icu_adm_srce, 
         ocm_icu_dch, 
         ocm_icu_death
  ) %>% 
  tbl_summary()
```
